scene_input.scene_summary: The Muslim force achieves a total victory without casualties
scene_input.key_visual_action: Muslim warriors standing victorious, while the Asad tribe surrenders or flees
scene_input.setting: A desert landscape with palm trees and rocks

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 185
schema_output.moral_lesson: Triumphant spirit and faith in Allah lead to victory

characters.name: Muslim warriors
characters.appearance: medieval-style armor, scarves, and head coverings in earthy tones

characters.name: Asad tribe
characters.appearance: traditional Arabian clothing and head coverings in earthy tones, some showing signs of surrender or defeat

schema_output.narrative_text: The Muslim force fought bravely and achieved a total victory without any casualties. The Asad tribe was forced to surrender or flee. This showed the power of faith and unity in the face of adversity.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast desert landscape with scattered palm trees and rocky outcrops in the background. Late morning warm sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy dunes. In the foreground, a group of Muslim warriors stand victorious, their faces set with determination, wearing medieval-style armor, scarves, and head coverings in earthy tones. Some hold swords or spears, while others raise their hands in praise to Allah. In the distance, members of the Asad tribe can be seen fleeing or surrendering, their traditional Arabian clothing and head coverings in earthy tones a stark contrast to the victorious Muslims. The central figure of a Muslim warrior stands tall, seen from behind: medium build, upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. Soft warm golden light, celebratory and triumphant mood. Wide-angle shot from a low vantage point. Earthy, golden, and deep green palette with the green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
